content: The span to depth ratio limit is specified in $$IS:$$ $$456-2000$$ for the reinforced concrete beams, in order to ensure that the

options.content: tensile crack width is below a limit
stress in the tension reinforcement is less than the allowable value
deflection of the beam is below a limiting value

content: For $$M25$$ concrete with creep coefficient of $$1.5,$$ the long-term static modulus of elasticity (expressed in $$MPa$$) as per provisions of $$IS:$$ $$456-2000$$ is ______________
